lang.title: Settings
lang.multiaction_change_responsible_full: access to multiple actions change responsible
lang.multiaction_add_task_full: access to multiple actions add task
lang.multiaction_change_status_full: access to multiple actions change stage
lang.multiaction_custom_fields_values_edit_fu: access to multiple actions change field
lang.multiaction_edit_tags_full: access to multiple actions edit tags
lang.multiaction_add_mass_message_full: access to multiple actions send messages to messengers
lang.multiaction_open_close_full: access to multiple actions close tasks
lang.multiaction_change_task_date_full: access to multiple actions change due date
lang.multiaction_change_task_type_full: access to multiple actions change task type
lang.user_rights_short_pass: Password must be 6 characters or more
lang.Shrink your links and track clicks: When: Shrink long links and track clicks: When enabled, URLs you send will be replaced with tracking links.
lang.Once clicked, a note will be added in th: Once clicked, an event will be logged in the lead's feed.
lang.Select which sources use this feature: Select which sources use this feature
lang.Error loading settings. Please reload th: Error loading settings. Please reload the page.
lang.When enabled, the sender's name from the: When enabled, the sender's name from their Kommo profile will be added to the first message they send in a chat. The name will show again after the client replies or when another teammate sends a new message. Select the channels where you want to display the sender's name.
lang.Our partners can set up Salesbot for you: Our partners can set up Salesbot for you.
lang.{{brand_name.ai}} is your AI assistant t: Kommo is your AI assistant that provides response suggestions for agents during chats by utilizing a knowledge base.
lang.When communicating with a client, the NP: When conversations are marked closed, Salesbot sends a customizable message requesting the customer to evaluate the service they received on a ten-point scale.
lang.When the issue is marked resolved, send: When the issue is marked resolved, send the following message:
lang.Please rate the service you received fro: Please rate the service you received from 1 (worst) to 10 (best)
lang.When a client gives a rating less than o: When a client gives a rating less than or equal to
lang.You can create bots to use in triggers o: You can create bots to use in triggers or edit your existing bots
lang.Build no-code bots to automate chats and: Build no-code bots to automate chats and routine tasks. Start from scratch or use a template — then customize it and add your triggers.
lang.Chat with customers faster by using pers: Chat with customers faster by using personalized response templates. They’re available when you chat in the lead card or use the AI power-up below.
lang.This template can be used by all phone n: This template can be used by all phone numbers connected to
lang.Enter a header for your message: Enter a header for your message
lang.Detect a client\u2019s intentions based: Detect a client’s intentions based on the keywords they use, and automatically send a chat template or run a salesbot
lang.The keyword dataset is automatically upd: The keyword dataset is automatically updated every hour, or you can manually update it any time
lang.Add document with phrases you can expect: Add document with phrases you can expect from users
lang.Assess the quality of service from 1 to: Assess the quality of service from 1 to 10
lang.Thank you for rating, we will inform the: Thank you for your feedback. Have a great day.
lang.The client rated the quality of service: The client rated the quality of service below the established level
lang.Set up the rules for creating a new conv: Select the rules for creating a new conversation
lang.When client writes a message to the chat: When a lead sends a chat message, Kommo adds it to the ongoing conversation. If there is no ongoing conversation, Kommo starts a new conversation in the corresponding lead.
lang.If there is no reply to a message in a c: If a user does not answer a chat message within
lang.add a \"Talk response time exceeded\" ev: add a "Response time exceeded" event in the event log
lang.Add the URLs of the websites where you w: Add the URLs of the websites where you will install online chat
lang.Paste the code in the HTML of your websi: Choose a display option and paste the code into the HTML of your page
lang.Install the online chat in the code of y: Install the online chat in the code of your website
lang.More options to adjust chat appearance i: More options to adjust chat appearance in
lang.You can adjust Online Chat appearance vi: You can adjust Online Chat appearance via
lang.Before copying, you need to specify the: Before copying, you need to specify the domain where you will place the online chat
lang.List of online chat connected for all pi: List of online chat connected for all pipelines. Here you can enable multiple conversations to account for customer calls through online chat.
lang.If you want to integrate online chat in: If you want to integrate online chat in your product and use your own customer IDs, select the transaction field in which this identifier will be stored.
lang.Import your help center URL, FAQ page, t: Import your help center URL, FAQ page, terms and conditions, and more to enhance its capabilities.
lang.Configure your AI agent to help communic: Configure your AI agent to help communicate with customers, qualify leads, organize them in the funnel, and fill in cards.
